title: FizzBuzz
description:
Read an integer n. For each number from 1 to n:
- Print 'Fizz' if divisible by 3
- Print 'Buzz' if divisible by 5
- Print 'FizzBuzz' if divisible by both 3 and 5
- Otherwise print the number itself

Each result on a new line.

test_cases.output:
1
2
Fizz
4
Buzz
Fizz
7
8
Fizz
Buzz
11
Fizz
13
14
FizzBuzz

hints: Use a for loop from 1 to n+1
Check divisibility by both 3 and 5 first (n % 15 == 0)
Remember to convert input to int
